name: tradingcalc-mcp
description: 12 deterministic crypto futures calculators across 3 suites: trade planning (pnl, breakeven, target_exit, position_sizer, average_entry, scenario), risk & margin (liquidation, max_leverage, hedge_ratio), funding & carry (funding_cost, funding_arb, compound_funding). Formulas normalized across 7 exchanges. Not AI estimates — exact numbers your trading bot can trust.
author: TradingCalc <sk@blockbitcap.com>
